name: Prison Punch
author: Poki
description: Prison Punch is a fighting game where you step into the gritty world of a prison boxing championship! Start by training hard in the gym to build your strength, agility, and endurance. Once you're ready, take on other prisoners in thrilling boxing matches and climb your way to the top. Getting hurt? Head to the canteen for a bite to recover your health. Use the coins you earn from your victories to enhance your skills and deck yourself out with cool accessories. Can you fight your way to freedom through brilliant victories in the ring? How to play Prison Punch? Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Prison Punch? Prison Punch is created by Panda Pasha Games. Play their other games on Poki: Survival Island and Blacksmith Tycoon ! How can I play Prison Punch for free? You can play Prison Punch for free on Poki. Can I play Prison Punch on mobile devices and desktop? Prison Punch can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
